seoTitle: Cape Otway vs Cape Paterson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Otway and Cape Paterson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Otway vs Cape Paterson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Otway and Cape Paterson.
heading: Cape Otway vs Cape Paterson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Otway, Victoria and Cape Paterson, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Otway has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Cape Paterson (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Otway or Cape Paterson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Otway has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Cape Paterson scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Otway scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Paterson scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Otway or Cape Paterson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Otway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
